prostate_cancer_diagnosis_date: First prostate cancer diagnosis date (OMOP-derived, date shifted)
gender: Gender concept name from OMOP vocabulary
race: Race concept name from OMOP vocabulary
ethnicity: Ethnicity concept name from OMOP vocabulary
age_at_diagnosis: Age in years at first prostate cancer diagnosis
lab_value_final: Final lab value used for analysis (converted if possible)
drug_initiation_date: Date of first platinum exposure (date shifted)
is_deceased: Indicates whether the patient has a death date
metastasis_date: Date of first metastatic condition (date shifted)
is_metastatic: Indicates whether the patient has metastatic disease
days_diagnosis_to_metastasis: Days from prostate cancer diagnosis to first metastasis (null if no metastasis)
time_to_platinum_or_censor: Days from diagnosis to platinum initiation or censoring
time_to_death_or_censor: Days from diagnosis to death or censoring
days_relative_to_diagnosis: Days from diagnosis to measurement date
days_relative_to_platinum_chemo_start: Days from platinum chemo start to measurement date
days_relative_to_last_followup: Days from last follow-up to measurement date
